sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68671" key="monosxidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-σχῐδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n68671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with one track</tr_>, of a fistula, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
